Common.tryAgainHint: Try refreshing the page or come back later.

hero.subtitle: Create trips, pin places on a map, schedule by day — drag to reorder. AI comes in a later phase.
hero.socialProof: Phase 1: hands-on trip planning for travelers (vi/en).

features.title: Everything you need right now
features.subtitle: Aligned with the Phase 1 roadmap — no AI, no microservices yet.

trips.title: Trip management
trips.body: Create, edit, and delete trips: destination, dates, budget, party size, status.

map.title: Places on a map
map.body: MapLibre + OpenFreeMap — click to capture lat/lng; markers per place.

itinerary.title: Day & slot itinerary
itinerary.body: Schedule activities by morning/afternoon/evening with places and times.

dnd.title: Drag-and-drop order
dnd.body: Reorder visitOrder within a slot with dnd-kit — persisted via atomic API.

i18n.title: Multilingual UI
i18n.body: Vietnamese and English via next-intl — switch locale anytime.

aiSoon.title: AI (coming later)
aiSoon.body: RAG-powered itineraries land in a later phase — today you plan manually.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: Four steps to a working itinerary on the web.

0.title: Sign up / sign in
0.body: Session cookie through the /api proxy — no JWT in Phase 1.

1.title: Create a trip
1.body: Set title, destination, start date, budget, and length.

2.title: Pin places
2.body: Click the map or enter coordinates — each place becomes a marker.

3.title: Schedule & reorder
3.body: Add items by slot, drag to reorder, refresh — order sticks.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Learning project in Phase 1 — no billing.
pricing.priceHint: Local / demo use — no real paid plans yet.

cta.title: Ready to explore?
cta.subtitle: Create an account and try the seeded Đà Lạt trip in minutes.

footer.blurb: An AI trip planner learning project — Phase 1: modular monolith + manual web UI.

Auth.tagline: Sign in with a session cookie (Phase 1).

Trips.title: Trips
Trips.empty: You do not have any trips yet.
Trips.saveSuccessBody: Your trip details have been updated.
Trips.deleteConfirm: Delete trip "{title}"? This cannot be undone.

Places.title: Places
Places.subtitle: Pin on the map — click the map to set coordinates.
Places.empty: No places yet. Click the map, then add a name.
Places.deleteConflict: Place is used by itinerary items — remove those first.
Places.mapHint: Click the map to fill lat/lng (amber marker = draft point).

Itinerary.title: Itinerary
Itinerary.subtitle: Schedule places by day and slot. Drag ⋮⋮ to reorder within a slot.
Itinerary.emptySlot: Empty — add an item on the right.
Itinerary.needPlaces: Add at least one place before creating itinerary items.
